Our Story

Where Flowers
Find New Life

Divyagrah was born from a simple, beautiful idea — the flowers offered at temples deserve more than to be discarded. We collect these sacred blooms, recycle them with love, and transform them into pure, eco-friendly fragrances that carry the sanctity of devotion into your home.

Every incense stick, every dhoop, is a second life for something sacred.

How We Create

From Temple to Your Home

01
Collection
Sacred flowers are respectfully collected from temples and devotional spaces across the city.
02
Purification
Petals are cleaned, sorted and sun-dried using traditional methods with no chemicals.
03
Crafting
Artisans hand-roll each incense stick using flower powder, natural binders and pure essential oils.
04
Blessed & Packed
Each batch is mindfully packed in eco-friendly packaging, ready to carry divinity to your door.

Our Eco Promise

Good for You.
Good for Earth.

Every product we make begins with a simple commitment: no flower offering should go to waste, and no home should breathe in synthetic chemicals. Our process is clean, our ingredients sacred, and our impact — zero waste.

🌺Flowers collected from temples and gardens — never thrown away
🧪No synthetic fragrances, no harmful chemicals, no charcoal
📦Packaging made from recycled materials, fully biodegradable
